chapter_title.en: The One Praying Encounters Predatory Animals and Harmful Creatures and He Kills Them

text: 1073 - وَ رَوَى حَرِيزٌ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «إِذَا كُنْتَ فِي صَلاَةِ اَلْفَرِيضَةِ فَرَأَيْتَ غُلاَماً لَكَ قَدْ أَبَقَ أَوْ غَرِيماً لَكَ عَلَيْهِ مَالٌ أَوْ حَيَّةً تَتَخَوَّفُهَا عَلَى نَفْسِكَ فَاقْطَعِ اَلصَّلاَةَ وَ اِتْبَعْ غُلاَمَكَ أَوْ غَرِيمَكَ وَ اُقْتُلِ اَلْحَيَّةَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1073 - Hariz narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"If you are in the obligatory prayer and you see one of your servants who has run away, or a debtor to whom you owe money, or a snake that you fear for your life, then break your prayer, follow your servant or debtor, and kill the snake."
